QueryReadFromSourceAG.value: '--Ver:1.0-Inirial  SELECT --top 1000 	 [ProjectSalesOrderId] = CAST(CustomerShipToId AS int) 	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] = CAST(5000000+CustomerShipToId AS varchar(10)) 	,[CustomerId] =  ISNULL([CustomerId],-1) 	,[CustomerShipToId] 	,[OrderType] = CAST((CASE WHEN RIGHT(PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId,3)='001' THEN 'Sales Order' 							ELSE  'Project' end) AS varchar(30)) 	,[Description] = CAST(PSO.[Name] AS varchar(60))  	,[ProjectType] = CAST('VCO' AS varchar(10)) 	,[ProjectTypeDescription] = CAST('Agility Projects' AS varchar(255)) 	,[ProjectTypeSort] = CAST(-6 AS int) 	,[Address] = CAST(PSO.[Address] AS varchar(160)) 	,[City] = CAST(PSO.[City] AS varchar(40)) 	,[ProvinceState] = CAST(PSO.[ProvinceState] AS varchar(40)) 	,[PostalZipCode] = CAST(PSO.[PostalZipCode] AS varchar(15))  	,[Country] = CAST('USA' AS varchar(40))  	,[CreatedDateTime] = CAST(CreateDate AS datetime) 	,[CreatedDate] = CAST(ISNULL(PR.ProjectCreatedDate,CreateDate) AS date) 	,[Note] = CAST(PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId AS varchar(8000))  	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = CAST('AgilityProjectUser' AS varchar(30)) 	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = CAST('AgilityProjectUser' AS varchar(30)) FROM Stg.AgilityCustomerShipto  PSO LEFT JOIN Stg.AgilityCustomer C on C.Code = PSO.CustCode LEFT JOIN Stg.[AgilityProjectCreateDate] PR ON PR.SourceCustomerShipToId = PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId '

QueryReadFromSource.value: '--Ver 2.0   SELECT --TOP 10 	 [ProjectSalesOrderId] = di_project_master_id 	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'E' THEN  'E|' + pm.ds_project ELSE pm.ds_project  END AS VARCHAR(12)) 	,[OrderType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN 'Project' WHEN 'E' THEN 'Estimate' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(30)) 	,[Description] = pn.ds_name 	,[Address] = pn.ds_address 	,[City] = pn.ds_city 	,[ProvinceState] = pn.ds_provstate 	,[PostalZipCode] = pn.ds_postcode 	,[County] = pn.ds_county 	,[Country] = pn.ds_country 	,[Phone] = pn.ds_phone 	,[Fax] = pn.ds_fax 	,[Email] = pn.ds_email 	,[Website] = pn.ds_website 	,[IsMetric] = (CASE WHEN sp.ds_metric IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 	,[CreatedDateTime] = pm.dd_date_entered 	,[CreatedDate] = CAST(PM.dd_date_entered AS DATE) 	,[StartDate] = sp.dd_startdate 	,[DrawingDate] = sp.dd_drawing 	,[SubmittedDate] = sp.dd_submitted 	,[CompletedDateTime] = oso.dd_completed 	,[CompletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_completed AS DATE) 	,[DeletedDateTime] = SP.dd_deleted 	,[DeletedDate] = CAST(sp.dd_deleted AS DATE) 	,[ExpiredDate] = NULL 	,[Addenda] = sp.ds_addenda 	,[SpecificationCode] = sp.ds_specode 	,[EstimateCode] = sp.ds_estcode 	,[Territory] = sp.ds_territory 	,[TerritoryName] = tr.ds_name	,[ProjectType] = CAST(UPPER(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN ISNULL(sp.ds_projecttype,'Unknown') WHEN 'E' THEN 'ESTIMATE' ELSE 'Unknown' END ) AS VARCHAR(10))   ,[ProjectTypeDescription] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN RTRIM(pt.ds_description) WHEN 'E' THEN 'Estimate' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(255))  	,[ProjectTypeSort]  = (CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN PT.di_sort WHEN 'E' THEN -4 ELSE -1 END ) 	,[SpecificationWriter] = sp.ds_specwriter 	,[ArchitectCode] = sp.ds_archcode 	,[DodgeCode] = sp.ds_dodgecode 	,[Rating] = pr.ds_code 	,[RatingDescription] = pr.ds_name 	,[BuildingCost] = sp.dn_total_building_cost 	,[CreditLimit] = sp.dn_credit_limit 	,[Note] = CAST(ISNULL(OSO.ds_note, PN.ds_notes) AS VARCHAR(8000)) 	,[DivisionCode] = sp.ds_division 	,[UserCode] = sp.ds_user 	,[CreatedByUserCode] = pm.ds_usercode 	,[CompletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_completed 	,[DeletedByUserCode] = sp.ds_delete_user 	,[EstimatorUserCode] = sp.ds_estimator 	,[DetailerUserCode] = sp.ds_detailer 	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = sp.ds_inside_sales 	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = sp.ds_outside_sales 	,[ProjectManagerUserCode] = sp.ds_project_manager 	,[MasterProjectId] = pm.di_project_master_id 	,[EstimateId] = NULL 	,[ArchitectId] = am.di_architect_id 	,[CustomerId] = c.di_customer_id 	,[CustomerShipToId] = pcsh.di_customer_shipto_id 	,[WarehouseId] = sp.di_warehouse_id 	,[SalesOrderStatus] = CAST( oso.ds_status as varchar(20)) 	,[RequestedDeliveryDate] = NULL 	,[CustomerJobNumber] = NULL 	,[CustomerPONumber] = NULL 	,[PricingFormula] = NULL 	,[PricingFormulaName] = NULL 	,[Delivery] = NULL 	,[DeliveryName] = NULL 	,[IsBulk] = NULL 	,[IsCounterSale] = NULL 	,[IsShipComplete] = NULL 	,[ExchangeRate] = NULL 	,[QuoteNumber] = NULL 	,[ProductPreTaxTotal] = NULL 	,[MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] = NULL 	,[TaxTotal] = NULL 	,[InternalNote] = NULL 	,[DeliveryNote] = NULL 	,[TermId] = NULL 	,[QuoteId] = NULL 	,ds_division   FROM dbo.projectname pn JOIN dbo.project_master pm ON pm.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND pm.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type JOIN dbo.specifications sp ON sp.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND sp.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type LEFT JOIN dbo.project_type pt ON pt.ds_project_type = sp.ds_projecttype LEFT JOIN dbo.project_rating pr WITH (NOLOCK) ON pr.di_project_rating_id = sp.di_project_rating_id LEFT JOIN dbo.project_customer_shipto pcsh ON pcsh.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND pcsh.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type 	AND db_default = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.customer_master c WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.ds_code = sp.ds_customer LEFT JOIN dbo.architect_master am WITH (NOLOCK) ON am.ds_code = sp.ds_architect LEFT JOIN dbo.territory tr WITH (NOLOCK) ON tr.ds_territory = sp.ds_territory LEFT JOIN ( 	SELECT ds_project 		,ds_trans_type 		,ds_note 		,dd_completed 		,ds_user_completed 		,db_metric 		,ds_status 	FROM dbo.ord_sales_order oso WITH (NOLOCK) 	LEFT JOIN dbo.note n WITH (NOLOCK) ON n.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id 	LEFT JOIN dbo.status_string ss WITH (NOLOCK) ON ss.di_status = oso.di_status 	AND ss.di_category = 0 	) oso ON oso.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND oso.ds_trans_type = pn.ds_trans_type WHERE di_order = 0   AND pn.ds_trans_type IN ('D','E') UNION ALL  SELECT -- top 10  	 [ProjectSalesOrderId] = di_sales_order_id 	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Q|' + oso.ds_project ELSE oso.ds_project  END AS VARCHAR(12)) 	,[OrderType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'Sales Order' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Quote' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(30)) 	,[Description] = pn.ds_name 	,[Address] = pn.ds_address 	,[City] = pn.ds_city 	,[ProvinceState] = pn.ds_provstate 	,[PostalZipCode] = pn.ds_postcode 	,[County] = pn.ds_county 	,[Country] = pn.ds_country 	,[Phone] = pn.ds_phone 	,[Fax] = pn.ds_fax 	,[Email] = pn.ds_email 	,[Website] = pn.ds_website 	,[IsMetric] = db_metric 	,[CreatedDateTime] = oso.dd_created 	,[CreatedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_created AS DATE) 	,[StartDate] = NULL 	,[DrawingDate] = NULL 	,[SubmittedDate] = NULL 	,[CompletedDateTime] = oso.dd_completed 	,[CompletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_completed AS DATE) 	,[DeletedDateTime] = dd_deleted 	,[DeletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_deleted AS DATE) 	,[ExpiredDate] = dd_expired 	,[Addenda] = NULL 	,[SpecificationCode] = NULL 	,[EstimateCode] = NULL 	,[Territory] = oso.ds_territory 		,[TerritoryName] = tr.ds_name 	,[ProjectType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'SALES' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'QUOTE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS VARCHAR(10)) 	,[ProjectTypeDescription] =  CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'Sales Order' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Quote' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(255)) 	,[ProjectTypeSort] = (CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN -2 WHEN 'Q' THEN -3 ELSE 'Unknown' END) 	,[SpecificationWriter] = NULL	,[ArchitectCode] = NULL 	,[DodgeCode] = NULL 	,[Rating] = NULL 	,[RatingDescription] = NULL 	,[BuildingCost] = NULL 	,[CreditLimit] = NULL 	,[Note] = N.ds_note 	,[DivisionCode] = ds_division 	,[UserCode] = NULL 	,[CreatedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_created 	,[CompletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_completed 	,[DeletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_deleted 	,[EstimatorUserCode] = NULL 	,[DetailerUserCode] = NULL 	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = oso.ds_inside_sales 	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = oso.ds_outside_sales 	,[ProjectManagerUserCode] = NULL 	,[MasterProjectId] = NULL 	,[EstimateId] = NULL 	,[ArchitectId] = NULL 	,[CustomerId] = cshc.di_customer_id 	,[CustomerShipToId] = oso.di_customer_shipto_id 	,[WarehouseId] = oso.di_warehouse_id 	,[SalesOrderStatus] = CAST( ss.ds_status as varchar(20)) 	,[RequestedDeliveryDate] = dd_requested_delivery 	,[CustomerJobNumber] = ds_customer_job_number 	,[CustomerPONumber] = ds_customer_po_number 	,[PricingFormula] = pf.ds_code 	,[PricingFormulaName] = pf.ds_name 	,[Delivery] = dl.ds_delivery 	,[DeliveryName] = dl.ds_name 	,[IsBulk] = db_bulk 	,[IsCounterSale] = db_counter_sale 	,[IsShipComplete] = cshc.db_ship_complete 	,[ExchangeRate] = dn_exchange_rate 	,[QuoteNumber] = di_sales_order_id_quote 	,[ProductPreTaxTotal] = dn_pretax_total_product 	,[MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] = dn_pretax_total_miscellaneous_cost 	,[TaxTotal] = dn_tax_total 	,[InternalNote] = intn.ds_note 	,[DeliveryNote] = deln.ds_note 	,[TermId] = di_terms_id 	,[QuoteId] = di_sales_order_id_quote	,ds_division  FROM dbo.projectname pn JOIN dbo.ord_sales_order oso WITH (NOLOCK) ON oso.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND oso.ds_trans_type = pn.ds_trans_type 	AND oso.ds_trans_type IN ( 'Q' 	,'O' ) LEFT JOIN dbo.territory tr WITH (NOLOCK) ON tr.ds_territory = oso.ds_territory LEFT JOIN dbo.delivery dl WITH (NOLOCK) ON dl.ds_delivery = oso.ds_delivery LEFT JOIN dbo.note n WITH (NOLOCK) ON n.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id LEFT JOIN dbo.note intn WITH (NOLOCK) ON intn.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id_internal LEFT JOIN dbo.note deln WITH (NOLOCK) ON deln.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id_delivery LEFT JOIN dbo.status_string ss WITH (NOLOCK) ON ss.di_status = oso.di_status 	AND ss.di_category = 0 LEFT JOIN ( 	SELECT csh.di_customer_shipto_id 		,di_customer_id 		,db_ship_complete 	FROM customer_master c 	JOIN dbo.customer_shipto csh ON csh.ds_customer = c.ds_code 	) cshc ON cshc.di_customer_shipto_id = oso.di_customer_shipto_id LEFT JOIN dbo.pricing_formula pf ON pf.di_pricing_formula_id = oso.di_pricing_formula_id'

QueryInsertUnknownRecs.value: '--Version 1.0  DECLARE @CurrentTime DATETIME = ?; DECLARE @ETLExecutionID BIGINT = ?; INSERT INTO [dbo].[ProjectSalesOrder] ( 	[ProjectSalesOrderId] 	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] 	,[OrderType] 	,[Description] 	,[Address] 	,[City] 	,[ProvinceState] 	,[PostalZipCode] 	,[County] 	,[Country] 	,[Phone] 	,[Fax] 	,[Email] 	,[Website] 	,[IsMetric] 	,[CreatedDateTime] 	,[CreatedDate] 	,[StartDate] 	,[DrawingDate] 	,[SubmittedDate] 	,[CompletedDateTime] 	,[CompletedDate] 	,[DeletedDateTime] 	,[DeletedDate] 	,[Addenda] 	,[SpecificationCode] 	,[EstimateCode] 	,[Territory] 	,[TerritoryName] 	,[ProjectType] 	,[ProjectTypeDescription] 	,[ProjectTypeSort] 	,[SpecificationWriter] 	,[ArchitectCode] 	,[DodgeCode] 	,[Rating] 	,[RatingDescription] 	,[BuildingCost] 	,[CreditLimit] 	,[Note] 	,[DivisionCode] 	,[UserCode] 	,[CreatedByUserCode] 	,[CompletedByUserCode] 	,[DeletedByUserCode] 	,[EstimatorUserCode] 	,[DetailerUserCode] 	,[InsideSalesUserCode] 	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] 	,[ProjectManagerUserCode] 	,[MasterProjectId] 	,[EstimateId] 	,[ArchitectId] 	,[CustomerId] 	,[CustomerShipToId] 	,[WarehouseId] 	,[SalesOrderStatus] 	,[RequestedDeliveryDate] 	,[CustomerJobNumber] 	,[CustomerPONumber] 	,[PricingFormula] 	,[PricingFormulaName] 	,[Delivery] 	,[DeliveryName] 	,[IsBulk] 	,[IsCounterSale] 	,[IsShipComplete] 	,[ExchangeRate] 	,[QuoteNumber] 	,[ProductPreTaxTotal] 	,[MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] 	,[TaxTotal] 	,[InternalNote] 	,[DeliveryNote] 	,[TermId] 	,[QuoteId] 	,[ETLCreateDate] 	,[ETLExecutionId] 	) SELECT - 1 AS [ProjectSalesOrderId] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProjectSalesOrderNumber] 	,'Unknown' AS [OrderType] 	,'Unknown' AS [Description] 	,'Unknown' AS [Address] 	,'Unknown' AS [City] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProvinceState] 	,'Unknown' AS [PostalZipCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [County] 	,'Unknown' AS [Country] 	,'Unknown' AS [Phone] 	,'Unknown' AS [Fax] 	,'Unknown' AS [Email] 	,'Unknown' AS [Website] 	,- 1 AS [IsMetric] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [CreatedDateTime] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [CreatedDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [StartDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [DrawingDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [SubmittedDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [CompletedDateTime] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [CompletedDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [DeletedDateTime] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [DeletedDate] 	,'Unknown' AS [Addenda] 	,'Unknown' AS [SpecificationCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [EstimateCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [Territory] 	,'Unknown' AS [TerritoryName] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProjectType] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProjectTypeDescription] 	,- 1 AS [ProjectTypeSort] 	,'Unknown' AS [SpecificationWriter] 	,'Unknown' AS [ArchitectCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [DodgeCode] 	,'Unkno' AS [Rating] 	,'Unknown' AS [RatingDescription] 	,0 AS [BuildingCost] 	,0 AS [CreditLimit] 	,'Unknown' AS [Note] 	,'Unknown' AS [DivisionCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [UserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [CreatedByUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [CompletedByUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [DeletedByUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [EstimatorUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [DetailerUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [InsideSalesUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [OutsideSalesUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProjectManagerUserCode] 	,- 1 AS [MasterProjectId] 	,- 1 AS [EstimateId] 	,- 1 AS [ArchitectId] 	,- 1 AS [CustomerId] 	,- 1 AS [CustomerShipToId] 	,- 1 AS [WarehouseId] 	,'Unknown' AS [SalesOrderStatus] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [RequestedDeliveryDate] 	,'Unknown' AS [CustomerJobNumber] 	,'Unknown' AS [CustomerPONumber] 	,'Unknown' AS [PricingFormula] 	,'Unknown' AS [PricingFormulaName] 	,'Unknown' AS [Delivery] 	,'Unknown' AS [DeliveryName] 	,- 1 AS [IsBulk] 	,- 1 AS [IsCounterSale] 	,- 1 AS [IsShipComplete] 	,0 AS [ExchangeRate] 	,'Unknown' AS [QuoteNumber] 	,0 AS [ProductPreTaxTotal] 	,0 AS [MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] 	,0 AS [TaxTotal] 	,'Unknown' AS [InternalNote] 	,'Unknown' AS [DeliveryNote] 	,- 1 AS [TermId] 	,- 1 AS [QuoteId] 	,@CurrentTime AS [ETLCreateDate] 	,@ETLExecutionID AS [ETLExecutionId]  '

QueryReadFromSourceAG.value: '--Ver:1.0-Inirial  SELECT --top 1000 	 [ProjectSalesOrderId] = CAST(CustomerShipToId AS int) 	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] = CAST(5000000+CustomerShipToId AS varchar(10)) 	,[CustomerId] =  ISNULL([CustomerId],-1) 	,[CustomerShipToId] 	,[OrderType] = CAST((CASE WHEN RIGHT(PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId,3)='001' THEN 'Sales Order' 							ELSE  'Project' end) AS varchar(30)) 	,[Description] = CAST(PSO.[Name] AS varchar(60))  	,[ProjectType] = CAST('VCO' AS varchar(10)) 	,[ProjectTypeDescription] = CAST('Agility Projects' AS varchar(255)) 	,[ProjectTypeSort] = CAST(-6 AS int) 	,[Address] = CAST(PSO.[Address] AS varchar(160)) 	,[City] = CAST(PSO.[City] AS varchar(40)) 	,[ProvinceState] = CAST(PSO.[ProvinceState] AS varchar(40)) 	,[PostalZipCode] = CAST(PSO.[PostalZipCode] AS varchar(15))  	,[Country] = CAST('USA' AS varchar(40))  	,[CreatedDateTime] = CAST(CreateDate AS datetime) 	,[CreatedDate] = CAST(ISNULL(PR.ProjectCreatedDate,CreateDate) AS date) 	,[Note] = CAST(PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId AS varchar(8000))  	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = CAST('AgilityProjectUser' AS varchar(30)) 	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = CAST('AgilityProjectUser' AS varchar(30)) FROM Stg.AgilityCustomerShipto  PSO LEFT JOIN Stg.AgilityCustomer C on C.Code = PSO.CustCode LEFT JOIN Stg.[AgilityProjectCreateDate] PR ON PR.SourceCustomerShipToId = PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId '

pm.ds_project  END AS VARCHAR(12)) 	,[OrderType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN 'Project' WHEN 'E' THEN 'Estimate' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(30)) 	,[Description] = pn.ds_name 	,[Address] = pn.ds_address 	,[City] = pn.ds_city 	,[ProvinceState] = pn.ds_provstate 	,[PostalZipCode] = pn.ds_postcode 	,[County] = pn.ds_county 	,[Country] = pn.ds_country 	,[Phone] = pn.ds_phone CAST(PM.dd_date_entered AS DATE) 	,[StartDate] = sp.dd_startdate 	,[DrawingDate] = sp.dd_drawing 	,[SubmittedDate] = sp.dd_submitted 	,[CompletedDateTime] = oso.dd_completed 	,[CompletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_completed AS DATE) 	,[DeletedDateTime] = SP.dd_deleted 	,[DeletedDate] = CAST(sp.dd_deleted AS DATE) 	,[ExpiredDate] = NULL 	,[Addenda] = sp.ds_addenda 	,[SpecificationCode] = sp.ds_specode 	,[EstimateCode] = sp.ds_estcode 	,[Territory] = sp.ds_territory 	,[TerritoryName] = tr.ds_name	,[ProjectType] = CAST(UPPER(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN ISNULL(sp.ds_projecttype,'Unknown') WHEN 'E' THEN 'ESTIMATE' ELSE 'Unknown' END ) AS VARCHAR(10))   ,[ProjectTypeDescription] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN RTRIM(pt.ds_description) WHEN 'E' THEN 'Estimate' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(255))  	,[ProjectTypeSort]  = (CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN PT.di_sort WHEN 'E' THEN -4 ELSE -1 END ) 	,[SpecificationWriter] = sp.ds_specwriter 	,[ArchitectCode] = sp.ds_archcode 	,[DodgeCode] = sp.ds_dodgecode 	,[Rating] = pr.ds_code 	,[RatingDescription] = pr.ds_name 	,[BuildingCost] = sp.dn_total_building_cost 	,[CreditLimit] = sp.dn_credit_limit 	,[Note] = CAST(ISNULL(OSO.ds_note, PN.ds_notes) AS VARCHAR(8000)) 	,[DivisionCode] = sp.ds_division 	,[UserCode] = sp.ds_user 	,[CreatedByUserCode] = pm.ds_usercode 	,[CompletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_completed 	,[DeletedByUserCode] = sp.ds_delete_user 	,[EstimatorUserCode] = sp.ds_estimator 	,[DetailerUserCode] = sp.ds_detailer 	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = sp.ds_inside_sales 	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = sp.ds_outside_sales 	,[ProjectManagerUserCode] = sp.ds_project_manager 	,[MasterProjectId] = pm.di_project_master_id 	,[EstimateId] = NULL 	,[ArchitectId] = am.di_architect_id 	,[CustomerId] = c.di_customer_id 	,[CustomerShipToId] = pcsh.di_customer_shipto_id 	,[WarehouseId] = sp.di_warehouse_id 	,[SalesOrderStatus] = CAST( oso.ds_status as varchar(20)) 	,[RequestedDeliveryDate] = NULL 	,[CustomerJobNumber] = NULL 	,[CustomerPONumber] = NULL 	,[PricingFormula] = NULL 	,[PricingFormulaName] = NULL 	,[Delivery] = NULL 	,[DeliveryName] = NULL 	,[IsBulk] = NULL 	,[IsCounterSale] = NULL 	,[IsShipComplete] = NULL 	,[ExchangeRate] = NULL 	,[QuoteNumber] = NULL 	,[ProductPreTaxTotal] = NULL 	,[MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] = NULL 	,[TaxTotal] = NULL 	,[InternalNote] = NULL 	,[DeliveryNote] = NULL 	,[TermId] = NULL 	,[QuoteId] = NULL 	,ds_division   FROM dbo.projectname pn JOIN dbo.project_master pm ON pm.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND pm.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type JOIN dbo.specifications sp ON sp.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND sp.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type LEFT JOIN dbo.project_type pt ON pt.ds_project_type = sp.ds_projecttype LEFT JOIN dbo.project_rating pr WITH (NOLOCK) ON pr.di_project_rating_id = sp.di_project_rating_id LEFT JOIN dbo.project_customer_shipto pcsh ON pcsh.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND pcsh.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type 	AND db_default = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.customer_master c WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.ds_code = sp.ds_customer LEFT JOIN dbo.architect_master am WITH (NOLOCK) ON am.ds_code = sp.ds_architect LEFT JOIN dbo.territory tr WITH (NOLOCK) ON tr.ds_territory = sp.ds_territory LEFT JOIN ( 	SELECT ds_project 		,ds_trans_type 		,ds_note 		,dd_completed 		,ds_user_completed 		,db_metric 		,ds_status 	FROM dbo.ord_sales_order oso WITH (NOLOCK) 	LEFT JOIN dbo.note n WITH (NOLOCK) ON n.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id 	LEFT JOIN dbo.status_string ss WITH (NOLOCK) ON ss.di_status = oso.di_status 	AND ss.di_category = 0 	) oso ON oso.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND oso.ds_trans_type = pn.ds_trans_type WHERE di_order = 0   AND pn.ds_trans_type IN ('D','E') UNION ALL  SELECT -- top 10  	 [ProjectSalesOrderId] = di_sales_order_id 	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Q|' + oso.ds_project ELSE oso.ds_project  END AS VARCHAR(12)) 	,[OrderType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'Sales Order' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Quote' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(30)) 	,[Description] = pn.ds_name 	,[Address] = pn.ds_address 	,[City] = pn.ds_city 	,[ProvinceState] = pn.ds_provstate 	,[PostalZipCode] = pn.ds_postcode 	,[County] = pn.ds_county 	,[Country] = pn.ds_country 	,[Phone] = pn.ds_phone 	,[Fax] = pn.ds_fax 	,[Email] = pn.ds_email 	,[Website] = pn.ds_website 	,[IsMetric] = db_metric 	,[CreatedDateTime] = oso.dd_created 	,[CreatedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_created AS DATE) 	,[StartDate] = NULL 	,[DrawingDate] = NULL 	,[SubmittedDate] = NULL 	,[CompletedDateTime] = oso.dd_completed 	,[CompletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_completed AS DATE) 	,[DeletedDateTime] = dd_deleted 	,[DeletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_deleted AS DATE) 	,[ExpiredDate] = dd_expired 	,[Addenda] = NULL 	,[SpecificationCode] = NULL 	,[EstimateCode] = NULL 	,[Territory] = oso.ds_territory 		,[TerritoryName] = tr.ds_name 	,[ProjectType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'SALES' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'QUOTE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS VARCHAR(10)) 	,[ProjectTypeDescription] =  CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'Sales Order' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Quote' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(255)) 	,[ProjectTypeSort] = (CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN -2 WHEN 'Q' THEN -3 ELSE 'Unknown' END) 	,[SpecificationWriter] = NULL	,[ArchitectCode] = NULL 	,[DodgeCode] = NULL 	,[Rating] = NULL 	,[RatingDescription] = NULL 	,[BuildingCost] = NULL 	,[CreditLimit] = NULL 	,[Note] = N.ds_note 	,[DivisionCode] = ds_division 	,[UserCode] = NULL 	,[CreatedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_created 	,[CompletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_completed 	,[DeletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_deleted 	,[EstimatorUserCode] = NULL 	,[DetailerUserCode] = NULL 	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = oso.ds_inside_sales 	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = oso.ds_outside_sales 	,[ProjectManagerUserCode] = NULL 	,[MasterProjectId] = NULL 	,[EstimateId] = NULL 	,[ArchitectId] = NULL 	,[CustomerId] = cshc.di_customer_id 	,[CustomerShipToId] = oso.di_customer_shipto_id 	,[WarehouseId] = oso.di_warehouse_id 	,[SalesOrderStatus] = CAST( ss.ds_status as varchar(20)) 	,[RequestedDeliveryDate] = dd_requested_delivery 	,[CustomerJobNumber] = ds_customer_job_number 	,[CustomerPONumber] = ds_customer_po_number 	,[PricingFormula] = pf.ds_code 	,[PricingFormulaName] = pf.ds_name 	,[Delivery] = dl.ds_delivery 	,[DeliveryName] = dl.ds_name 	,[IsBulk] = db_bulk 	,[IsCounterSale] = db_counter_sale 	,[IsShipComplete] = cshc.db_ship_complete 	,[ExchangeRate] = dn_exchange_rate 	,[QuoteNumber] = di_sales_order_id_quote 	,[ProductPreTaxTotal] = dn_pretax_total_product 	,[MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] = dn_pretax_total_miscellaneous_cost 	,[TaxTotal] = dn_tax_total 	,[InternalNote] = intn.ds_note 	,[DeliveryNote] = deln.ds_note 	,[TermId] = di_terms_id 	,[QuoteId] = di_sales_order_id_quote	,ds_division  FROM dbo.projectname pn JOIN dbo.ord_sales_order oso WITH (NOLOCK) ON oso.ds_project = pn.ds_project 	AND oso.ds_trans_type = pn.ds_trans_type 	AND oso.ds_trans_type IN ( 'Q' 	,'O' ) LEFT JOIN dbo.territory tr WITH (NOLOCK) ON tr.ds_territory = oso.ds_territory LEFT JOIN dbo.delivery dl WITH (NOLOCK) ON dl.ds_delivery = oso.ds_delivery LEFT JOIN dbo.note n WITH (NOLOCK) ON n.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id LEFT JOIN dbo.note intn WITH (NOLOCK) ON intn.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id_internal LEFT JOIN dbo.note deln WITH (NOLOCK) ON deln.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id_delivery LEFT JOIN dbo.status_string ss WITH (NOLOCK) ON ss.di_status = oso.di_status 	AND ss.di_category = 0 LEFT JOIN ( 	SELECT csh.di_customer_shipto_id 		,di_customer_id 		,db_ship_complete 	FROM customer_master c 	JOIN dbo.customer_shipto csh ON csh.ds_customer = c.ds_code 	) cshc ON cshc.di_customer_shipto_id = oso.di_customer_shipto_id LEFT JOIN dbo.pricing_formula pf ON pf.di_pricing_formula_id = oso.di_pricing_formula_id'

QueryInsertUnknownRecs.value: '--Version 1.0  DECLARE @CurrentTime DATETIME = ?; DECLARE @ETLExecutionID BIGINT = ?; INSERT INTO [dbo].[ProjectSalesOrder] ( 	[ProjectSalesOrderId] 	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] 	,[OrderType] 	,[Description] 	,[Address] 	,[City] 	,[ProvinceState] 	,[PostalZipCode] 	,[County] 	,[Country] 	,[Phone] 	,[Fax] 	,[Email] 	,[Website] 	,[IsMetric] 	,[CreatedDateTime] 	,[CreatedDate] 	,[StartDate] 	,[DrawingDate] 	,[SubmittedDate] 	,[CompletedDateTime] 	,[CompletedDate] 	,[DeletedDateTime] 	,[DeletedDate] 	,[Addenda] 	,[SpecificationCode] 	,[EstimateCode] 	,[Territory] 	,[TerritoryName] 	,[ProjectType] 	,[ProjectTypeDescription] 	,[ProjectTypeSort] 	,[SpecificationWriter] 	,[ArchitectCode] 	,[DodgeCode] 	,[Rating] 	,[RatingDescription] 	,[BuildingCost] 	,[CreditLimit] 	,[Note] 	,[DivisionCode] 	,[UserCode] 	,[CreatedByUserCode] 	,[CompletedByUserCode] 	,[DeletedByUserCode] 	,[EstimatorUserCode] 	,[DetailerUserCode] 	,[InsideSalesUserCode] 	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] 	,[ProjectManagerUserCode] 	,[MasterProjectId] 	,[EstimateId] 	,[ArchitectId] 	,[CustomerId] 	,[CustomerShipToId] 	,[WarehouseId] 	,[SalesOrderStatus] 	,[RequestedDeliveryDate] 	,[CustomerJobNumber] 	,[CustomerPONumber] 	,[PricingFormula] 	,[PricingFormulaName] 	,[Delivery] 	,[DeliveryName] 	,[IsBulk] 	,[IsCounterSale] 	,[IsShipComplete] 	,[ExchangeRate] 	,[QuoteNumber] 	,[ProductPreTaxTotal] 	,[MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] 	,[TaxTotal] 	,[InternalNote] 	,[DeliveryNote] 	,[TermId] 	,[QuoteId] 	,[ETLCreateDate] 	,[ETLExecutionId] 	) SELECT - 1 AS [ProjectSalesOrderId] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProjectSalesOrderNumber] 	,'Unknown' AS [OrderType] 	,'Unknown' AS [Description] 	,'Unknown' AS [Address] 	,'Unknown' AS [City] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProvinceState] 	,'Unknown' AS [PostalZipCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [County] 	,'Unknown' AS [Country] 	,'Unknown' AS [Phone] 	,'Unknown' AS [Fax] 	,'Unknown' AS [Email] 	,'Unknown' AS [Website] 	,- 1 AS [IsMetric] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [CreatedDateTime] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [CreatedDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [StartDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [DrawingDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [SubmittedDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [CompletedDateTime] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [CompletedDate] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [DeletedDateTime] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [DeletedDate] 	,'Unknown' AS [Addenda] 	,'Unknown' AS [SpecificationCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [EstimateCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [Territory] 	,'Unknown' AS [TerritoryName] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProjectType] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProjectTypeDescription] 	,- 1 AS [ProjectTypeSort] 	,'Unknown' AS [SpecificationWriter] 	,'Unknown' AS [ArchitectCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [DodgeCode] 	,'Unkno' AS [Rating] 	,'Unknown' AS [RatingDescription] 	,0 AS [BuildingCost] 	,0 AS [CreditLimit] 	,'Unknown' AS [Note] 	,'Unknown' AS [DivisionCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [UserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [CreatedByUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [CompletedByUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [DeletedByUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [EstimatorUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [DetailerUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [InsideSalesUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [OutsideSalesUserCode] 	,'Unknown' AS [ProjectManagerUserCode] 	,- 1 AS [MasterProjectId] 	,- 1 AS [EstimateId] 	,- 1 AS [ArchitectId] 	,- 1 AS [CustomerId] 	,- 1 AS [CustomerShipToId] 	,- 1 AS [WarehouseId] 	,'Unknown' AS [SalesOrderStatus] 	,'1900-01-01' AS [RequestedDeliveryDate] 	,'Unknown' AS [CustomerJobNumber] 	,'Unknown' AS [CustomerPONumber] 	,'Unknown' AS [PricingFormula] 	,'Unknown' AS [PricingFormulaName] 	,'Unknown' AS [Delivery] 	,'Unknown' AS [DeliveryName] 	,- 1 AS [IsBulk] 	,- 1 AS [IsCounterSale] 	,- 1 AS [IsShipComplete] 	,0 AS [ExchangeRate] 	,'Unknown' AS [QuoteNumber] 	,0 AS [ProductPreTaxTotal] 	,0 AS [MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] 	,0 AS [TaxTotal] 	,'Unknown' AS [InternalNote] 	,'Unknown' AS [DeliveryNote] 	,- 1 AS [TermId] 	,- 1 AS [QuoteId] 	,@CurrentTime AS [ETLCreateDate] 	,@ETLExecutionID AS [ETLExecutionId]  '

scripts.text:
SELECT ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ETLCreateDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS RowsInserted
FROM [dbo].[ProjectSalesOrder] WHERE ETLExecutionID=340

QueryReadFromSource.defaultValue:
'--Ver 2.0
 
SELECT --TOP 10
	 [ProjectSalesOrderId] = di_project_master_id
	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'E' THEN  'E|' + pm.ds_project ELSE pm.ds_project  END AS VARCHAR(12))
	,[OrderType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN 'Project' WHEN 'E' THEN 'Estimate' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(30))
	,[Description] = pn.ds_name
	,[Address] = pn.ds_address
	,[City] = pn.ds_city
	,[ProvinceState] = pn.ds_provstate
	,[PostalZipCode] = pn.ds_postcode
	,[County] = pn.ds_county
	,[Country] = pn.ds_country
	,[Phone] = pn.ds_phone
	,[Fax] = pn.ds_fax
	,[Email] = pn.ds_email
	,[Website] = pn.ds_website
	,[IsMetric] = (CASE WHEN sp.ds_metric IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
	,[CreatedDateTime] = pm.dd_date_entered
	,[CreatedDate] = CAST(PM.dd_date_entered AS DATE)
	,[StartDate] = sp.dd_startdate
	,[DrawingDate] = sp.dd_drawing
	,[SubmittedDate] = sp.dd_submitted
	,[CompletedDateTime] = oso.dd_completed
	,[CompletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_completed AS DATE)
	,[DeletedDateTime] = SP.dd_deleted
	,[DeletedDate] = CAST(sp.dd_deleted AS DATE)
	,[ExpiredDate] = NULL
	,[Addenda] = sp.ds_addenda
	,[SpecificationCode] = sp.ds_specode
	,[EstimateCode] = sp.ds_estcode
	,[Territory] = sp.ds_territory
	,[TerritoryName] = tr.ds_name	,[ProjectType] = CAST(UPPER(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN ISNULL(sp.ds_projecttype,'Unknown') WHEN 'E' THEN 'ESTIMATE' ELSE 'Unknown' END ) AS VARCHAR(10)) 
 ,[ProjectTypeDescription] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN RTRIM(pt.ds_description) WHEN 'E' THEN 'Estimate' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(255)) 
	,[ProjectTypeSort]  = (CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'D' THEN PT.di_sort WHEN 'E' THEN -4 ELSE -1 END ) 	,[SpecificationWriter] = sp.ds_specwriter
	,[ArchitectCode] = sp.ds_archcode
	,[DodgeCode] = sp.ds_dodgecode
	,[Rating] = pr.ds_code
	,[RatingDescription] = pr.ds_name
	,[BuildingCost] = sp.dn_total_building_cost
	,[CreditLimit] = sp.dn_credit_limit
	,[Note] = CAST(ISNULL(OSO.ds_note, PN.ds_notes) AS VARCHAR(8000))
	,[DivisionCode] = sp.ds_division
	,[UserCode] = sp.ds_user
	,[CreatedByUserCode] = pm.ds_usercode
	,[CompletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_completed
	,[DeletedByUserCode] = sp.ds_delete_user
	,[EstimatorUserCode] = sp.ds_estimator
	,[DetailerUserCode] = sp.ds_detailer
	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = sp.ds_inside_sales
	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = sp.ds_outside_sales
	,[ProjectManagerUserCode] = sp.ds_project_manager
	,[MasterProjectId] = pm.di_project_master_id
	,[EstimateId] = NULL
	,[ArchitectId] = am.di_architect_id
	,[CustomerId] = c.di_customer_id
	,[CustomerShipToId] = pcsh.di_customer_shipto_id
	,[WarehouseId] = sp.di_warehouse_id
	,[SalesOrderStatus] = CAST( oso.ds_status as varchar(20))
	,[RequestedDeliveryDate] = NULL
	,[CustomerJobNumber] = NULL
	,[CustomerPONumber] = NULL
	,[PricingFormula] = NULL
	,[PricingFormulaName] = NULL
	,[Delivery] = NULL
	,[DeliveryName] = NULL
	,[IsBulk] = NULL
	,[IsCounterSale] = NULL
	,[IsShipComplete] = NULL
	,[ExchangeRate] = NULL
	,[QuoteNumber] = NULL
	,[ProductPreTaxTotal] = NULL
	,[MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] = NULL
	,[TaxTotal] = NULL
	,[InternalNote] = NULL
	,[DeliveryNote] = NULL
	,[TermId] = NULL
	,[QuoteId] = NULL 	,ds_division
 
FROM dbo.projectname pn
JOIN dbo.project_master pm ON pm.ds_project = pn.ds_project
	AND pm.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type
JOIN dbo.specifications sp ON sp.ds_project = pn.ds_project
	AND sp.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type
LEFT JOIN dbo.project_type pt ON pt.ds_project_type = sp.ds_projecttype
LEFT JOIN dbo.project_rating pr WITH (NOLOCK) ON pr.di_project_rating_id = sp.di_project_rating_id
LEFT JOIN dbo.project_customer_shipto pcsh ON pcsh.ds_project = pn.ds_project
	AND pcsh.ds_trans_type = PN.ds_trans_type
	AND db_default = 1
LEFT JOIN dbo.customer_master c WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.ds_code = sp.ds_customer
LEFT JOIN dbo.architect_master am WITH (NOLOCK) ON am.ds_code = sp.ds_architect
LEFT JOIN dbo.territory tr WITH (NOLOCK) ON tr.ds_territory = sp.ds_territory
LEFT JOIN (
	SELECT ds_project
		,ds_trans_type
		,ds_note
		,dd_completed
		,ds_user_completed
		,db_metric
		,ds_status
	FROM dbo.ord_sales_order oso WITH (NOLOCK)
	LEFT JOIN dbo.note n WITH (NOLOCK) ON n.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id
	LEFT JOIN dbo.status_string ss WITH (NOLOCK) ON ss.di_status = oso.di_status
	AND ss.di_category = 0
	) oso ON oso.ds_project = pn.ds_project
	AND oso.ds_trans_type = pn.ds_trans_type
WHERE di_order = 0

 AND pn.ds_trans_type IN ('D','E') UNION ALL

SELECT -- top 10 
	 [ProjectSalesOrderId] = di_sales_order_id
	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Q|' + oso.ds_project ELSE oso.ds_project  END AS VARCHAR(12))
	,[OrderType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'Sales Order' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Quote' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(30))
	,[Description] = pn.ds_name
	,[Address] = pn.ds_address
	,[City] = pn.ds_city
	,[ProvinceState] = pn.ds_provstate
	,[PostalZipCode] = pn.ds_postcode
	,[County] = pn.ds_county
	,[Country] = pn.ds_country
	,[Phone] = pn.ds_phone
	,[Fax] = pn.ds_fax
	,[Email] = pn.ds_email
	,[Website] = pn.ds_website
	,[IsMetric] = db_metric
	,[CreatedDateTime] = oso.dd_created
	,[CreatedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_created AS DATE)
	,[StartDate] = NULL
	,[DrawingDate] = NULL
	,[SubmittedDate] = NULL
	,[CompletedDateTime] = oso.dd_completed
	,[CompletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_completed AS DATE)
	,[DeletedDateTime] = dd_deleted
	,[DeletedDate] = CAST(oso.dd_deleted AS DATE)
	,[ExpiredDate] = dd_expired
	,[Addenda] = NULL
	,[SpecificationCode] = NULL
	,[EstimateCode] = NULL
	,[Territory] = oso.ds_territory
		,[TerritoryName] = tr.ds_name
	,[ProjectType] = CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'SALES' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'QUOTE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS VARCHAR(10))
	,[ProjectTypeDescription] =  CAST(CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN 'Sales Order' WHEN 'Q' THEN 'Quote' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS VARCHAR(255))
	,[ProjectTypeSort] = (CASE pn.ds_trans_type WHEN 'O' THEN -2 WHEN 'Q' THEN -3 ELSE 'Unknown' END)
	,[SpecificationWriter] = NULL	,[ArchitectCode] = NULL
	,[DodgeCode] = NULL
	,[Rating] = NULL
	,[RatingDescription] = NULL
	,[BuildingCost] = NULL
	,[CreditLimit] = NULL
	,[Note] = N.ds_note
	,[DivisionCode] = ds_division
	,[UserCode] = NULL
	,[CreatedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_created
	,[CompletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_completed
	,[DeletedByUserCode] = oso.ds_user_deleted
	,[EstimatorUserCode] = NULL
	,[DetailerUserCode] = NULL
	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = oso.ds_inside_sales
	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = oso.ds_outside_sales
	,[ProjectManagerUserCode] = NULL
	,[MasterProjectId] = NULL
	,[EstimateId] = NULL
	,[ArchitectId] = NULL
	,[CustomerId] = cshc.di_customer_id
	,[CustomerShipToId] = oso.di_customer_shipto_id
	,[WarehouseId] = oso.di_warehouse_id
	,[SalesOrderStatus] = CAST( ss.ds_status as varchar(20))
	,[RequestedDeliveryDate] = dd_requested_delivery
	,[CustomerJobNumber] = ds_customer_job_number
	,[CustomerPONumber] = ds_customer_po_number
	,[PricingFormula] = pf.ds_code
	,[PricingFormulaName] = pf.ds_name
	,[Delivery] = dl.ds_delivery
	,[DeliveryName] = dl.ds_name
	,[IsBulk] = db_bulk
	,[IsCounterSale] = db_counter_sale
	,[IsShipComplete] = cshc.db_ship_complete
	,[ExchangeRate] = dn_exchange_rate
	,[QuoteNumber] = di_sales_order_id_quote
	,[ProductPreTaxTotal] = dn_pretax_total_product
	,[MiscellaneousPreTaxTotal] = dn_pretax_total_miscellaneous_cost
	,[TaxTotal] = dn_tax_total
	,[InternalNote] = intn.ds_note
	,[DeliveryNote] = deln.ds_note
	,[TermId] = di_terms_id
	,[QuoteId] = di_sales_order_id_quote	,ds_division

FROM dbo.projectname pn
JOIN dbo.ord_sales_order oso WITH (NOLOCK) ON oso.ds_project = pn.ds_project
	AND oso.ds_trans_type = pn.ds_trans_type
	AND oso.ds_trans_type IN ( 'Q' 	,'O' )
LEFT JOIN dbo.territory tr WITH (NOLOCK) ON tr.ds_territory = oso.ds_territory
LEFT JOIN dbo.delivery dl WITH (NOLOCK) ON dl.ds_delivery = oso.ds_delivery
LEFT JOIN dbo.note n WITH (NOLOCK) ON n.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id
LEFT JOIN dbo.note intn WITH (NOLOCK) ON intn.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id_internal
LEFT JOIN dbo.note deln WITH (NOLOCK) ON deln.di_note_id = oso.di_note_id_delivery
LEFT JOIN dbo.status_string ss WITH (NOLOCK) ON ss.di_status = oso.di_status
	AND ss.di_category = 0
LEFT JOIN (
	SELECT csh.di_customer_shipto_id
		,di_customer_id
		,db_ship_complete
	FROM customer_master c
	JOIN dbo.customer_shipto csh ON csh.ds_customer = c.ds_code
	) cshc ON cshc.di_customer_shipto_id = oso.di_customer_shipto_id
LEFT JOIN dbo.pricing_formula pf ON pf.di_pricing_formula_id = oso.di_pricing_formula_id'

QueryReadFromSourceAG.defaultValue:
'--Ver:1.0-Inirial
 SELECT --top 1000
	 [ProjectSalesOrderId] = CAST(CustomerShipToId AS int)
	,[ProjectSalesOrderNumber] = CAST(5000000+CustomerShipToId AS varchar(10))
	,[CustomerId] =  ISNULL([CustomerId],-1)
	,[CustomerShipToId]
	,[OrderType] = CAST((CASE WHEN RIGHT(PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId,3)='001' THEN 'Sales Order'
							ELSE  'Project' end) AS varchar(30))
	,[Description] = CAST(PSO.[Name] AS varchar(60)) 
	,[ProjectType] = CAST('VCO' AS varchar(10))
	,[ProjectTypeDescription] = CAST('Agility Projects' AS varchar(255))
	,[ProjectTypeSort] = CAST(-6 AS int)
	,[Address] = CAST(PSO.[Address] AS varchar(160))
	,[City] = CAST(PSO.[City] AS varchar(40))
	,[ProvinceState] = CAST(PSO.[ProvinceState] AS varchar(40))
	,[PostalZipCode] = CAST(PSO.[PostalZipCode] AS varchar(15))
 	,[Country] = CAST('USA' AS varchar(40)) 
	,[CreatedDateTime] = CAST(CreateDate AS datetime)
	,[CreatedDate] = CAST(ISNULL(PR.ProjectCreatedDate,CreateDate) AS date)
	,[Note] = CAST(PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId AS varchar(8000))

	,[InsideSalesUserCode] = CAST('AgilityProjectUser' AS varchar(30))
	,[OutsideSalesUserCode] = CAST('AgilityProjectUser' AS varchar(30))
FROM Stg.AgilityCustomerShipto  PSO
LEFT JOIN Stg.AgilityCustomer C on C.Code = PSO.CustCode
LEFT JOIN Stg.[AgilityProjectCreateDate] PR ON PR.SourceCustomerShipToId = PSO.SourceCustomerShipToId'
